label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation)
rationale: Top-of-form entity name. The form is used by both domestic and foreign nonprofits — following the CORP_CLKRA-3 precedent for dual-use forms, this maps to `entity.name`. For foreign nonprofits filing this correction, synth should also populate `entity.home_jurisdiction_name` to match `entity.name` for cover-letter consistency.

label_verbatim: incorporated under the laws of the State of ___, and authorized to carry on activities in Maine
rationale: Home-jurisdiction state — populated only when the filer is a foreign nonprofit. The form's preamble offers two parallel parentheticals: '(incorporated under the laws of the State of Maine)' for domestic and '(incorporated under the laws of the State of ___)' for foreign; only one applies and the unused parenthetical is struck through or left blank.

label_verbatim: FIRST: On ___ (date) the Secretary of State filed a document...
rationale: FIRST inline date blank — date the original document was filed.

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...entitled: ___ (i.e. Articles of Incorporation, Articles of Amendment, etc.)
rationale: FIRST full-width blank — title of the original document being corrected.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The inaccuracy or defect to be corrected is described as follows:
rationale: THIRD large multi-line text block — free-text description of the error or defect in the original filing.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The portion of the said document to be corrected is corrected to read in its entirety as follows:
rationale: FOURTH large multi-line text block — the corrected language in its entirety.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: The address of the registered office of the corporation in the State of Maine is ___ (line 1, inline trailing blank)
rationale: SIXTH inline trailing blank (right side, end of 'is ___'). Maps to existing registered_agent namespace per convention.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: ___ (line 2, full-width continuation; '(street, city, state and zip code)' caption)
rationale: SIXTH full-width continuation line for the Maine registered office address. Same canonical key as Text7. Filler should write the complete address into Text8 (full-width) and leave Text7 blank, OR a partial leading-text into Text7 and the rest into Text8.

label_verbatim: DATED ___
rationale: Date of signature (narrow widget on the left of the signature row).

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / ___ (type or print name and capacity) — first signer
rationale: First *By signer's printed name and capacity (Shape D combined). Right side, upper position.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature) / ___ (type or print name and capacity) — second signer
rationale: Second *By signer's printed name and capacity (Shape D combined). Right side, lower position. Form footnote 'MUST be signed by any duly authorized officer' (singular) — second slot optional.
